title: Code Generator
warning: This feature is for development environment use only, not recommended for production. Click to watch the demo.
aiPlaceholder:
Now completely free
Try copying an image and press ctrl+v or command+v
Try describing your table and let AI help you complete it.
This feature requires getting your AI-Path from the plugin market personal center, filling it in config.yaml under autocode-->ai-path, and restarting the project.
Press Ctrl+Enter or Cmd+Enter to generate directly
aiTip: [Completely Free] Go to the plugin market personal center to apply for AIPath, fill it in the ai-path property of config.yaml to use.
dbTip: Note: You need to configure multiple databases in db-list in advance. If not configured, you need to configure and restart the service before use. (Here you can select the corresponding database table, which can be understood as which database to select the table from)
structAbbrTip: Abbreviation will be used as parameter object name and route group
descriptionPlaceholder: Chinese description as automatic API description
packageNameTip: Default name for generated files (recommended to be in camelCase, first letter lowercase, like sysXxxXxxx)
gvaModelTip: Note: Will automatically include primary key and soft delete operation configuration in the global.Model structure
createBtnAuthTip: Note: Will automatically generate button permission configuration in the page. If buttons are not assigned in role management, they will not be visible
createApiTip: Note: Register automatically generated APIs into the database
createMenuTip: Note: Register automatically generated menus into the database
syncTableTip: Note: Automatically synchronize database table structure, can be disabled if not needed
createResourceTip: Note: Will automatically add created_by, updated_by, deleted_by to the structure for user resource permission control
useTemplateTip: Note: Using the basic template will not generate any structures and CRUD, only configure properties like enter for easy non-CRUD logic development
treeTip: Note: Will automatically create parentID for parent-child relationship association, only supports int type primary key

fieldDialog.dataSourceConfig: Data Source Configuration (Advanced configuration, may cause auto-generated code to be unusable if programming basics are not solid)

rollbackDialog.title: Rollback:
rollbackDialog.confirmDelete: This operation will rollback generated files and checked items, continue?
rollbackDialog.deleteTableWarning: This operation will delete auto-created files and APIs (will delete the table!!!), continue?
rollbackDialog.deleteTableConfirm: This operation will delete auto-created files and APIs (will delete the table!!!), please confirm again!!!

functionDrawer.aiWarning: Current AI writing has unstable factors, please manually adjust parts of the code after generation
functionDrawer.aiHelpPlaceholder: AI writing feature, enter prompt information for automatic code generation

messages.deleteConfirm: This operation will delete this history, continue?
messages.completeAICode: Please use AI help to complete basic code first, if generation fails please try again
messages.aiError: AI is busy, please try again
messages.aiError2: AI is distracted, please try again
